Chordata > Actinopterygii > Gobiiformes > Gobioidei > Gobiidae

Grey knight-goby

Stigmatogobius sadanundio

Updated Sep 2020

Where seen?

This large greyish goby with spots is sometimes seen in our mangrove streams.

Features

About 6cm long. Pearly grey with 3-4 rows of small round black spots on the sides. Spots and streaks also on the fins and tail.

What does it eat? According to FishBase, it feeds on small fishes and invertebrates, including mosquito larvae.

Admiralty Park, Mar 11
Admiralty Park, Mar 11
